hidden_import_lines.component: Drive belts, belt tensioner and idler wheels
Fuel pre-filter and fuel fine filter
Engine oil and oil filters / by-pass filter, Note the Oil Specification in the service protocol in product center. Service interval can be increased if VDS-4.5 ULA oil is used, see Operators manual.
Reading out ash load, DPF: Note the percentage in the service protocol in product center
